title: CRYPTO CROSSING
blurb: Money you can't hold in your hand? Today you'll learn how digital crypto coins work and how to stay safe!
mission: Learn what cryptocurrency is and how to use it wisely.
what: Cryptocurrency is digital money that lives on computers, not in your pocket.
key: Crypto is real money you can't touch, so guard it carefully.
swapGood: “Crypto is real digital money I must protect.”
intro: Follow the path of a digital coin…
rule: Only risk what you can afford to lose.
star: Crypto is real money, so treat it that way!
goal: “Learn how crypto works before risking even $5.”
smartTip: If it sounds too good, it's a scam!
gbBody: Some crypto moves keep you safe; others are traps set by scammers.
tip: Never tell anyone your secret key.
badWarn: Scammers love kids who don't ask first!
goodNote: Smart and safe wins every time!

title: NFT NEXUS
blurb: Can you own a picture that only lives online? Today you'll discover how digital ownership works!
mission: Learn what an NFT is and how digital ownership works.
what: An NFT is a digital item that proves you own one special thing online.
key: An NFT shows ownership, but it can still lose value fast.
swapBad: “I own this picture forever for sure.”
swapGood: “I own a digital token that could change value.”
rule: Buy because you like it, not for fast money.
star: Own what you love, not what's hyped.
goal: “Only buy a digital item I truly love with spare money.”
smartTip: Hype fades, but a smart choice lasts!
gbBody: Some NFT choices are smart; others trick you with fakes and hype.
gbKey: Owning isn't the same as winning.
tip: Check it's the real one before you buy.
badWarn: Don't buy just because everyone else is!
goodNote: A choice you love is a smart choice!

title: VOLATILITY VORTEX
blurb: Up, down, up again! Today you'll learn why digital prices swing so fast and how to stay calm!
mission: Learn why prices swing up and down and how to handle it.
what: Volatility is when a price jumps up and down very fast.
key: Big swings mean big risk, so never bet what you need.
swapBad: “The price only goes up from here.”
swapGood: “The price can swing both ways, so I'm careful.”
goal: “Stay calm through swings and risk only spare money.”
gbBody: Some swing habits keep you steady; others let fear take over.
gbKey: Don't bet more than you can lose.
tip: Breathe and think before you react.
badWarn: Fear and greed both drain your money!
goodNote: Steady riders stay in the game!

title: BLOCKCHAIN BLVD
blurb: Imagine a notebook everyone shares that no one can cheat! Today you'll learn how a blockchain works!
mission: Learn how a blockchain records and verifies things safely.
what: A blockchain is a shared list that records and checks every move.
key: Many computers check it, so cheating is very hard.
swapGood: “Everyone shares and checks the same record.”
stepsSub: Three steps to add a block
intro: Follow how a new block is added…
rule: A blockchain is shared, so no one can cheat alone.
goal: “Trust the record because many computers check it.”
smartTip: Safe records still need a careful user!
gbBody: A blockchain is safe, but scammers still try to trick the people using it.
gbKey: The record is safe; people get tricked.
tip: A safe ledger can't stop a scam link.
badWarn: Crooks trick people, not the blockchain itself!
goodNote: A smart user keeps the system safe!

title: COINAVERSE MARKET
blurb: Games have their own money and shops! Today you'll learn how virtual economies really work!
mission: Learn how in-game money and digital goods work.
what: A virtual economy is money and goods that exist inside a game.
key: Game items feel free, but real money often buys them.
swapGood: “Real cash buys game coins, so I spend wisely.”
intro: See how game money really works…
rule: Real money buys game stuff, so think first.
goal: “Set a small game budget and never go over it.”
smartTip: A budget keeps gaming fun, not costly!
gbBody: Some game-money habits are smart; others lead to surprise costs.
tip: Check the real price before you tap buy.
badWarn: Surprise charges can add up super fast!
goodNote: Smart spenders keep the fun going!

title: AI INNOVATION LABS
blurb: Robots that help with money? Today you'll learn how AI can help you make smart money moves!
mission: Learn how AI can help with money and where to be careful.
what: AI is smart computer tech that learns and helps you with tasks.
key: AI can help with money, but it can also make mistakes.
swapGood: “AI gives ideas, but I check them myself.”
stepsSub: Three steps to stay in charge
intro: See how AI helps with money…
rule: AI helps, but you make the final choice.
star: AI is a tool, but you are the boss.
goal: “Use AI for ideas, but I decide what to do.”
smartTip: AI is smart, but you're smarter together!
gbBody: AI can be a great helper, but trusting it blindly can lead you wrong.
gbKey: AI gives ideas; you give judgment.
tip: Double-check what AI tells you about money.
badWarn: AI can be tricked or simply wrong sometimes!
goodNote: You plus AI makes a great team!

title: FUTURE TRENDS CMD
blurb: What will money look like tomorrow? Today you'll learn to spot trends and plan ahead safely!
mission: Learn to think ahead about money trends without taking wild risks.
what: A trend is the way things are slowly changing over time.
key: Trends hint at the future, but no one knows it for sure.
swapBad: “I know exactly what will happen next.”
swapGood: “I see a trend, but I plan for surprises too.”
intro: Look ahead at where money is going…
rule: Plan ahead, but never bet on a sure thing.
goal: “Watch trends, keep learning, and risk only spare money.”
gbBody: Some future thinking is smart planning; other moves are just risky gambles.
tip: Stay flexible since the future can surprise you.
badWarn: Betting on a 'sure thing' can cost you big!
goodNote: Smart planners are ready for anything!
